overview: A vibrant Poki-like gaming portal with 10 browser-based games including Snake, 2048, Memory Match, Flappy Bird, Tic-Tac-Toe and more. Features a beautiful homepage, game grid, and individual game play views.
features: Homepage with hero section and featured games
10-game grid with search and category tags
Individual game play view with canvas
5 fully playable games: Snake, 2048, Memory Match, Flappy Bird, Tic-Tac-Toe
5 stub games ready for future implementation
Responsive layout for all screen sizes
